generationData.description: Neo Tokyo: a cyberpunk dystopia of street samurai, cyborgs, androids, and hackers
generationData.backgroundPrompt: A sprawling futuristic cityscape under a neon-drenched night sky, filled with towering skyscrapers, flickering holographic advertisements, and bustling streets. Shadowy figures roam the alleys—street samurai with glowing katanas, hooded hackers peering into digital interfaces, and sleek cybernetic androids integrated into the crowd. Hovering vehicles zip by above, casting vibrant reflections on rain-soaked streets. The atmosphere is dense with smoke and intrigue, evoking a sense of high-tech, low-life tension.

locations.name: Neon Nexus Plaza
locations.sdPrompt: A bustling central plaza in a cyberpunk city, filled with neon signs, holograms, and diverse characters idling and socializing beneath towering skyscrapers. Stylized game art, vivid colors, and a futuristic atmosphere.

locations.name: Neuro Arcana
locations.sdPrompt: A library with a futuristic design, glowing shelves filled with digital books and holographic displays. The structure is adorned with cybernetic motifs and neon-lit pathways. Stylized game art, cyberpunk aesthetic, vibrant colors.

locations.name: Scribe's Sanctum
locations.sdPrompt: A high-tech writing studio with sleek digital surfaces and interfaces, where data is transformed into creative works. The exterior features cyber-graffiti and a neon glow, suggesting a place of innovation. Stylized game art, bright colors.

locations.name: Cyber Forge
locations.sdPrompt: A workshop with a rugged look, filled with gears, mechanical arms, and neon sparks flying. The facade is industrial with digital elements integrated into its structure. Stylized game art, robust and functional design.

locations.name: Command Citadel
locations.sdPrompt: A command center with a fortress-like appearance, surrounded by towering antennas and holographic displays. The building emits a glow from numerous screens, depicting a hub of control. Stylized game art, authoritative and futuristic.

locations.name: Data Watchtower
locations.sdPrompt: An observatory perched high above the city, with rotating radar dishes and a panoramic window offering views of the digital skyline. The exterior is covered in digital patterns, signifying constant vigilance. Stylized game art, sleek and modern.

locations.name: Signal Spire
locations.sdPrompt: A communications tower adorned with antenna arrays and pulsating neon lights. The structure reaches skyward, symbolizing a connection to the broader world. Stylized game art, bright and dynamic with a sense of outreach.

locations.name: Arcane Gateway
locations.sdPrompt: A mystic gateway with swirling digital runes and a portal emitting an ethereal glow. The structure looks both ancient and advanced, hinting at its power to create and dismiss agents. Stylized game art, magical and otherworldly.

locations.name: Mission Nexus
locations.sdPrompt: A mission board room with an interactive digital wall displaying complex task lists and strategic plans. The facade is covered in neon patterns, representing a place of organization and purpose. Stylized game art, vibrant and strategic.

generationData.description: Tortuga: An island refuge built by pirates, for pirates
generationData.backgroundPrompt: a tropical pirate haven nestled on a lush island, bustling with and surrounded by azure waters and anchored ships, vibrant pirate flags fluttering in the breeze, palm trees lining the shore, and wooden huts peeking from dense jungle, evoking adventure and camaraderie under a golden sunset sky
